name: Pet Registration
description: New pet registration or registration renewal
checks: Is this a new registration or renewal?
Which form is being submitted (C3A, P1A)?

outcomes.new_registration: New registration with all required information

response_templates.new_registration: Thank you for registering your {animal_type} ({animal_name}). Registration will be processed within 10 business days.
response_templates.renewal: Thank you for your registration renewal for {animal_name}. It will be processed within 5 business days.
